message:
fix(ui): render BasketSidebar via portal to fix stacking context

The BasketSidebar was rendered inside the header which has sticky
positioning with z-50. This created a stacking context that could
cause the sidebar backdrop to not properly overlay page content.

Now uses createPortal to render at document.body level, consistent
with how BottomSheet works. This ensures proper z-index layering
regardless of where the component is mounted in the React tree.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
